## What & why
<!-- What does this change, and why? Link any related issue: Closes #123 -->

## Type
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / chain / integration
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist
- [ ] `python -m pytest -q` passes
- [ ] `python -m compileall optimus_gateway server admin run.py` is clean
- [ ] No private keys / xprv / seed phrases added to code, logs, or tests
- [ ] Money math stays in **integer cents**; idempotency preserved
- [ ] Added/updated tests where relevant
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
